anomalies.description: Bot offline 74 days — 61st consecutive flag. Zero live revenue. All 5 feedback loops frozen.
Kelly=-0.167. WR=44.5% vs 52.4% needed. Every 100 trades = -$1,384 expected loss. R:R deficit: avg win $82.72, avg loss $91.27 (ratio 0.91).
anomalies.action: HYPE_SL_ATR_WIDEN — pending dev fix. Target: widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR, maintain >=2.0 R:R

anomalies.description: 80-90% conf = 40.0% WR (worst tier in 100d). 90%+ conf = 40.5%. Higher model confidence predicts worse outcomes. confidence_paradox_sizing_v1 partially addresses (85-90%) but 80-100% range needs full intervention.
anomalies.action: CONF_70_80_DEGRADATION_PROBE active (gate_20, 0.85x size). Expand scope to 80-100% in next run.

anomalies.description: HYPE 68% of total losses (-$5,563 of -$8,173 in 100d). HYPE SHORT SLs = 69 hits x -$221.92 = -$15,312 (52% of all SL losses). HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE added gate_20.
anomalies.action: HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE active (gate_20, 0.75x cap). Monitor WR change.

anomalies.description: short_direction_veto_v1 blocks better-performing side. SHORT 46.4% WR > LONG 39.5% WR in 100d. SHORT is net +$3,178 better than LONG on equal trade counts.
anomalies.action: SHORT_DIRECTION_VETO_INVERSION probe active (gate_20). Deactivate veto if SHORT WR >= LONG WR on n>=30 live trades.

anomalies.description: 5 of 7 feedback state files missing (signal_quality.json, regime_feedback_state.json, confidence_state.json, strategy_weights.json, llm_memory). Cold-restart discards all calibration.
anomalies.action: Auto-resolves when bot restarts and processes first live trade close.
